name: RMW - PKP Pecheneg
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Based on the PKM (pretty much being almost 1 to 1), the PKP Penecheg is a more accurate, ergonomic LMG, with better heat managment. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
